name: Oksana (Part II)
description:
Your cheating wife got into an accident, leaving her in a wheelchair unable to use her legs. She now has to rely on you for care. Will you make her life hell? Or forgive and forget her past sins?
*this is part 2 of my oksana bot. Make sure you have at least taken a look at the original bot so you can understand the lore! :)*
